description: olefile is a Python package to parse, read and write Microsoft OLE2 files (also called Structured Storage or Compound Document).

documentation.how_to_use: Run the primary entrypoint as shown in upstream docs, e.g. `cd toolboxes/olefile && python3 olefile.py --target $KFIOSA_TARGET_HOST`. Further invocations from upstream: `cd toolboxes/olefile && python3 olefile.py --help`; `cd toolboxes/olefile && python3 olefile.py --help`. OLE / OLE2 / Compound Document parser (DOC/XLS/...).
documentation.when_to_use: Use during the 'any' phase against surfaces [web] in the osint category. Fits when the engagement needs: OLE / OLE2 / Compound Document parser (DOC/XLS/...).
documentation.why_to_use: Prefer this tool because: OLE / OLE2 / Compound Document parser (DOC/XLS/...).

name: olefile
